item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, we have seen how prioritizing collective interests can protect against authoritarianism and maintain social stability.

notes: Agent A begins with a DISAGREE label and a balance/rights-caution frame, then visibly shifts toward defending collective stability and communal justice while still preserving individual safeguards. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, with only a bounded final caveat about shared responsibility.
